_note: Curated deployment record for the Base Sepolia C2/R3 multi-vault stack (DeployGovernance + DeployFullStack + TransferToSafe, broadcast 2026-05-22). Mirrors the deployments/ convention (cf. openassets-vaults-11155111.json).
_provenance: Reconstructed and verified on-chain because the deploy broadcast was NOT committed (broadcast/ is gitignored). Method: eth_getCode (every address below has non-empty bytecode on Base Sepolia) + Blockscout getcontractcreation (tokenFactory recovered as the SREF1 receipt-token proxy's on-chain creator). Core addresses cross-checked against Straton-Backend migration 20260522000000_base_sep_c2r3_repoint.sql. stfToken was NOT redeployed by this stack (carried over; verified to have code on Base Sepolia). The full ERC-3643 registry/module set (claimTopicsRegistry, trustedIssuersRegistry, modularCompliance, rate-limit modules) is not captured here — only what the package + Backend consume, plus governance/impls; recover from the deploy broadcast if needed.
stack: C2/R3 — TransparentUpgradeableProxy + per-proxy ProxyAdmin owned by TimelockController(48h); operator holds only WHITELIST_AGENT_ROLE + MINTER_ROLE (AGENT_ROLE split via R3); AGENT_ROLE + DEFAULT_ADMIN on the Cold Safe.

supersedes._reason: Pre-R3 stack — setWhitelisted gated by the monolithic AGENT_ROLE (the escalation R3 splits). Orphaned on-chain, no longer referenced.
